description: Bug Hunt Tactical Locations and Signals - Compendium pp.191, 208-209.

tactical_locations.description: Represent sites of potential value: computer consoles, sealable pathways, useful infrastructure. Marked with 0.5"x0.5" square markers.
tactical_locations.placement: 6 Tactical Locations on the battlefield (reduced by Signal count if using Signals rule). Spread evenly, at least 2" from Objective markers.
tactical_locations.investigation: A figure must finish a move within 3" without firing or engaging in a Brawl to investigate.
tactical_locations.activation: Roll 1D6+Savvy, score 5+ to activate. A second failure means the location is permanently compromised.
tactical_locations.enemy_interaction: Enemies ignore Tactical Locations until activated. Once activated, normal effects apply.

types.name: Distract
types.effect: When activated, all enemies within 18" are Distracted and cannot act during the next Enemy Action phase. Contact markers unaffected, but newly revealed enemies within range are affected immediately.

types.name: Block
types.effect: The area within 2" of the marker becomes Impassable to Enemies or Contact markers, but passable by player figures. At end of each round (including current), roll D6: On a 6, the area becomes passable again at end of following round.

types.name: Neutralize
types.effect: Remove any one Contact marker of your choice.

types.name: Delay
types.effect: For the rest of the current round and the following two rounds, no new Contact markers can be added to the battlefield. Ignore any rule that would require such placement.

signals.description: Optional rule - Compendium p.208. Signals represent areas of enemy activity, potential survivors or ambushes.
signals.placement: Place 1D6 Signals, then fill remaining slots (up to total of 6) with Tactical Locations. Place in or adjacent to terrain features.
signals.increased_alertness: At end of each round, roll 1D6 for every Signal within 9" of a trooper. For every 1, place a Contact marker on top of the Signal.
signals.investigation: Same conditions as Tactical Locations: finish move within 3" without firing or Brawling.
signals.hq_requirement: If 4-6 Signals present, must investigate at least 2 or reduce Objectives completed by 1.

signal_table.name: Civilians
signal_table.effect: Find 1D3 civilians with normal trooper profile but no weapons. Cannot act this round. Earn 1 Reputation for each civilian successfully evacuated.

signal_table.name: Evidence
signal_table.effect: Data pointing to the origin of the attack. Counts as 1 additional Objective completed.

signal_table.name: Danger
signal_table.effect: Beacon warning of enemy entry point. Randomly select a battlefield edge point and mark as a Spawn Point.

signal_table.name: Ambush
signal_table.effect: Treat the Signal as a Contact marker that rolled 3-6 (CONTACT!). Place enemies normally per Contact rules.

signal_table.name: Trooper
signal_table.effect: SOS from a captured trooper. Place a trooper with basic profile and Service Pistol. They fight with you for the rest of the mission. Earn 1 Reputation for rescuing them.

signal_table.name: Supplies
signal_table.effect: Supply cache left by a recon squad. Receive 2 additional Support points for your campaign.
